zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Brienne於1258年出生在法國薩特盧艾時，她的父親Louis de BRIENNE39歲，母親Agnès de BEAUMONT24歲。她於1286年11月11日與Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾享年65歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Brienne于1258年出生在法国薩特盧艾时，她的父亲Louis de BRIENNE39岁，母亲Agnès de BEAUMONT24岁。她于1286年11月11日与Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾享年65岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Brienne was born in 1258, in Loué, Sarthe, France, her father, Louis de BRIENNE, was 39 and her mother, Agnès de BEAUMONT, was 24. She married Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency on 11 November 1286, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1323, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Brienne est née en 1258, à Loué, Sarthe, France, son père, Louis de BRIENNE, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agnès de BEAUMONT, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency le 11 novembre 1286, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1323, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Brienne 1258 in Loué, Sarthe, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis de BRIENNE 39 und ihre Mutter Agnès de BEAUMONT 24. Sie hat am 11. November 1286 in Frankreich Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1323 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Brienne è nata il nel 1258 nel Loué, Sarthe, Francia, sua padre, Louis de BRIENNE, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Agnès de BEAUMONT, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency il 11 novembre 1286, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1323, nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Brienneが1258年にフランスサルスロウeで生まれた時，父Louis de BRIENNEは39歳，母Agnès de BEAUMONTは24歳であった。1286年11月11日にフランスでGuy VIII de Laval-Montmorencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルで65歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンオリベトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Brienne(이)가 1258년 프랑스 사르테 루e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis de BRIENNE(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de BEAUMONT(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1286년 11월 11일 프랑스에서 Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Brienne nasceu em 1258, em Loué, Sarthe, França, seu pai, Louis de BRIENNE, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency em 11 de novembro de 1286, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1323, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Brienne родилась в 1258 г. в местности лоуe, сарт, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis de BRIENNE было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de BEAUMONT, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency 11 ноября 1286 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1323 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности оливет, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Brienne nació en 1258, en Loué, Sarthe, Francia, su papá, Louis de BRIENNE, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency el 11 de noviembre de 1286, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1323, en Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
